title: SVNIT Research Associate, Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
short_info: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) Research Associate-I (RA-I) or Project Associate-I (PA-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Research Associate-I (RA-I) or Project Associate-I (PA-I) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: For RA-I: Ph.D. in Electronics Engineering or equivalent OR 3 years research/teaching/design experience after M.E./M.Tech in VLSI Design/Microelectronics/Electronics & Communication with at least one SCI journal paper. For PA-I: M.E./M.Tech in VLSI Design/Microelectronics/Electronics & Communication or equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA - Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA - Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) or Project Associate-I (PA-I) posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) or Project Associate-I (PA-I) positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For RA-I, a Ph.D. or M.E./M.Tech with 3 years of experience and an SCI paper is required. For PA-I, M.E./M.Tech in relevant fields is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the applicants is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA to Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SVNIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the SVNIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application and required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is SVNIT located?
faq.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) is located in Surat, Gujarat.
